rationale: Educ. Code §12.156 governs applicability of charter school provisions to college and junior college charter schools. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 12.156. APPLICABILITY OF CERTAIN PROVISIONS. (a) Except as otherwise provided by this subchapter, Subchapter D applies to a college or university charter school or junior college charter school as though the college or university charter school or junior college charter school, as applicable, were granted a charter under that subchapter.
_note: No conflict. Rule text concerns charter school applicability and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
